description_long: This object depicts a stylized adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a dynamic, forward-leaning pose, as if in mid-stride or leap. The figure has a detailed human face with defined features and long, wavy hair styled back from the face. The upper body is partially enveloped by angular, wing-like extensions that protrude from the back and sides, giving the figure a surreal, almost avian appearance. The clothing appears form-fitting, with a smooth texture and no visible seams or accessories, and the legs are dramatically extended, emphasizing motion. The feet are pointed, and the arms are bent, contributing to the sense of movement. The overall design is abstract and artistic, blending human and geometric elements in a striking manner.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, dynamic pose, and angular, wing-like extensions, featuring a detailed human face and long hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed face, long hair, and the dramatic forward extension of the limbs and wing-like structures.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, bent limbs, the dynamic posture, and the profile of the head and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the symmetrical arrangement of the wing-like extensions, and the extended legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the stretched limbs, the angular extensions, and the side profile of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with abstract, angular extensions
attribute_posture: dynamic, forward-leaning stride with extended limbs
